xfail.saxonMeta/Simple.testSet/simple006: disputed section 5.3 missing-component case: contradicts saxonMeta/Missing/missing006 (near-identical xs:list with a missing itemType, expected VALID). The test's own Description admits it could be valid under XSD 1.0 section 5.3 (missing components), so helium deterministically defers the missing anonymous-list itemType and accepts, matching missing006
